title: KBTV-023 The theory that if you pick up a woman who has just seen the happy appearance of a friend at a wedding ceremony, there is a high possibility that you will get married
description: Succeeded in picking up Maika-chan, who said she was returning from her friend's wedding! !! As an attitude survey about my friend's marriage, I decided to interview at the hotel and ask for a reaction! ?? I want to get married, but I can't deny my frustration! ?? Thorough verification that such a girlfriend will easily let you do it! !!
